creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Fri May  9 03:42:56 2014
New Revision: 353416
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353416
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353416/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here:
    - Sort *_DEPENDS
    - Remove Author line
  
  PR:		ports/189311
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/math/p5-CAD-Calc/Makefile
  head/math/p5-CAD-Calc/pkg-descr

Modified: head/math/p5-CAD-Calc/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/math/p5-CAD-Calc/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:42:52 2014	(r353415)
+++ head/math/p5-CAD-Calc/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:42:56 2014	(r353416)
@@ -8,12 +8,15 @@ CATEGORIES=	math graphics perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Generic cad-related geometry calculations
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Math-Vec>=0:${PORTSDIR}/math/p5-Math-Vec \
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Math-Geometry-Planar-Offset>=0:${PORTSDIR}/math/p5-Math-Geometry-Planar-Offset \
 		p5-Math-Round-Var>=0:${PORTSDIR}/math/p5-Math-Round-Var \
-		p5-Math-Geometry-Planar-Offset>=0:${PORTSDIR}/math/p5-Math-Geometry-Planar-Offset
+		p5-Math-Vec>=0:${PORTSDIR}/math/p5-Math-Vec
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 USES=		perl5

Modified: head/math/p5-CAD-Calc/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/math/p5-CAD-Calc/pkg-descr	Fri May  9 03:42:52 2014	(r353415)
+++ head/math/p5-CAD-Calc/pkg-descr	Fri May  9 03:42:56 2014	(r353416)
@@ -1,4 +1,3 @@
 A library of generic CAD-related geometry calculations.
 
-Author: Eric L. Wilhelm <ewilhelm at cpan dot org>
 WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/CAD-Calc/
